title: Find My Device -  Pin for headset location
scenario: Find My Device map merges multiple headset pins at the same location into a single pin with a count number
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap on the 'Find My Device' feature (or locate it under Account or Device Settings).
4. Ensure GPS location permission is granted to the app when prompted.
5. Observe the map view displayed on the screen.
6. Check the pin icons for connected headsets — they should appear as blue geo icons.
7. Check the pin icons for disconnected headsets — they should appear as gray geo icons.
8. If multiple devices are at the same location, verify that the pins merge into a single pin with a count number displayed.
expected: The app displays a map with blue geo icons for connected headsets and gray geo icons for disconnected headsets. When multiple devices share the same location, pins merge into one with a count number. GPS location permission is required and properly handled.
